landing.subtitle: Detect new tokens in real-time, analyze safety scores, and trade — all in one dashboard. Never miss a launch, never ape blindly.

features.heading: Everything you need to <highlight>snipe safely</highlight>
features.subheading: Built for degens who value speed and safety equally.

realtime.title: Real-time Detection
realtime.desc: New tokens appear within seconds of creation. Live radar tracks every launch on Solana.

safety.title: Safety Analysis
safety.desc: Every token is scored for rug-pull risk — mint authority, freeze authority, LP status, and more.

charts.title: Live Charts & Swap
charts.desc: OHLCV charts via GeckoTerminal, one-click swap via Jupiter — all inside the dashboard.

multiDex.title: Multi-DEX Coverage
multiDex.desc: Tracks Pump.fun, Raydium, and Moonshot simultaneously. Never miss a launch.

sources.heading: Multi-DEX <highlight>coverage</highlight>
sources.subheading: Tracking the top Solana launch platforms simultaneously.

detect.title: Detect
detect.desc: Our worker monitors Solana DEXes 24/7 and detects new tokens within seconds of creation.

analyze.title: Analyze
analyze.desc: Each token is enriched with on-chain data — mint authority, LP status, holder count, and safety score.

act.title: Act
act.desc: View charts, check safety, and swap directly through Jupiter — all from one place.

cta.heading: Ready to start <highlight>scanning</highlight>?
cta.subheading: No sign-up required. Open the dashboard and start tracking tokens instantly.

footer.disclaimer: Data provided as-is. DYOR. Not financial advice.

footer.tagline: Real-time memecoin detection and safety analysis for Solana.

donate.title: Support Us
donate.desc: TokenRadar is free to use. Help us keep it running by donating SOL.
